name: survey-service
description: Internal survey/form ingestion, analysis, and Angular UI (monorepo scaffold).

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace @survey-service/contracts run build && npm --workspace @survey-service/connectors run build && npm --workspace @survey-service/messaging run build && npm --workspace @survey-service/db run build && npm --workspace @survey-service/shared run build
scripts.build:apps: npm --workspace @survey-service/api run build && npm --workspace @survey-service/worker run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck:apps
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm --workspace @survey-service/contracts run typecheck && npm --workspace @survey-service/connectors run typecheck && npm --workspace @survey-service/messaging run typecheck && npm --workspace @survey-service/db run typecheck && npm --workspace @survey-service/shared run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:apps: npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:worker
scripts.test: npm run test:packages && npm run test:api
scripts.test:packages: npm --workspace @survey-service/contracts run test && npm --workspace @survey-service/connectors run test && npm --workspace @survey-service/shared run test
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:api && npm run lint:worker
scripts.format: npm run format:web && npm run format:api && npm run format:worker
scripts.format:check:all: npm run format:check:web && npm run format:check:api && npm run format:check:worker
